case_title: COURTNEY K. HALL VS. JEFF KIM # 192

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2010 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HALL, COURTNEY K. AS TO DEFENDANT KIM   # 192, JEFF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-13-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$100.00) SERVED MAR-15-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KIM   # 192, JEFF

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HALL, COURTNEY K. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KIM   # 192, JEFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-03-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-03-2010 BY COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. MR. MIKE WILSON, DEPUTY FIANACE DIRECTOR, APPEARED ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES(SEE CASE # 832710).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-13-2010 - CONTINUED TO JUN-03-2010 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT ORDERS THIS CASE CONTINUED TO JUN-03-2010 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 506, 400 MCALLISTER STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102. CONTINUED FOR CONSOLIDATION. PLAINTIFF SHALL BE PREPARED TO INFORM THE COURT WHY THE SEVEN DESCRIBED CASES DO NOT CONSTITUTE SPLIT CLAIMS RELATED TO A SINGLE INCIDENT OR CLAIM.
